text: hi this is key from BBC learning english
today I'm going to tell you three
different ways of using the phrasal verb
takeoff first we use takeoff to describe
removing clothing well it's really hot
here so I'm going to take off my jumper
you can also separate take and off and
say take my jumper off second we use
successful I'm going to be rich
my business has taken off third we use
take off to describe not going to work
I'm going to take a day of work tomorrow
so we can say take off my jumper or take
my jumper off my business has taken off
and lastly take a day off
